item.title: Game of the Year Awards, MADiSON and MultiVersus Madness - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another incredible This Week in Gaming. The 2021 Game Awards are coming and we chat what we think about the 6 nominee’s before diving into the game play trailer for the upcoming horror game MADiSON. Washing down all that gaming goodness with impressions on the reveal of MultiVersus and what we think about this upcoming free to play brawler. item.title: Halo Infinite Release, Battlefield 2042 Issues and HUGE Playstation Rumors - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another incredible This Week in Gaming. item.title: Deep Dive: The Cave - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming Scientist Josh and Gaming Time-Traveler Paul are taking a tour through The Cave in this week’s Deep Dive. The Cave is a little known game but brings a ton of charm to the game world. With 7 playable characters, all brimming with personality it’s a raucous time of betrayal, revenge, humour and some truly epic gaming moments. item.title: Diggin’ Deep with Shovel Knight - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming Knight Josh and Host Knight Paul are charging into your ear holes with this week's amazing episode on Shovel Knight! An iconic, classic gaming homage to the classic platformers of yester-year, we break down everything you could want to know on this gaming classic. item.title: Deep Divin’ Deathloop - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming visionaries Josh and Paul are resetting the loop and diving into Deathloop in this week's episode. One of the hotter gaming releases recently, Deathloop is getting lots of acclaim. Does it live up to the hype and what’s it all about? Join us as we breakdown gameplay, weapons, levels and more. item.title: Deep Dive: Monster Hunter World - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming monster hunters Paul and Josh are back with another incredible gaming deep dive episode. It may be a case of better late than never, but we’re diving into Monster Hunter World. Nominated by RangerMiller we’re slaughtering innocent beasts in the Monster Hunter world and giving our thoughts on everything from weapons to monsters to quest. Is this entry into one of gaming's iconic series worth picking up if you’ve never played? We break it all down in our usual goofy fashion!
Thanks to our LEGENDARY supporters: Jake and RangerMiller

item.title: TWIG: Marvel’s Midnight Sun, Hearthstone Mercenaries Fail, PUPrologue - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another video game news filled episode of This Week in Gaming. Marvel’s Midnight Sun announced and we talk what it’s like to bunk with superheroes before jumping into the Hearthstone Mercenaries gaming reveal that was all but revealing. PlayerUnknown looks to be doing something amazing with Prologue… will it pan out or just be an empty world to run around in? Thanks to our LEGENDARY supporters: Jake and RangerMiller

item.title: Deep Dive: 12 Minutes - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming time-loopers Paul and Josh are back with another incredible gaming deep dive episode. In this can’t miss episode, we chat about the new release 12 Minutes. A time-loop based game with an old school point and click adventure feel with some insane voice acting talent. We’ve got the full gaming deep dive followed by a very special spoilers section you don’t want to miss! item.title: TWIG: Martha is Dead, Saints Row Reboot and Lego: Skywalker Saga - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another video game news filled episode of This Week in Gaming. Martha is Dead… poor Martha… no it’s a new psychological horror game coming up. Then we find out Josh has never played Saints Row before talking about the reboot. Lego: Skywalker Saga looks great, but is it just more of the same? Only one way to stay up to date with the news you actually care about, and that’s by checking out This Week in Gaming. item.title: Deep Dive: Splitgate - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming portal-slingers Paul and Josh are back with another stellar gaming deep dive episode. In this episode we’re breaking down all that is Splitgate. The new hotness that’s been out for awhile, but just exploding in popularity. Halo meets Portal as some describe it. If you’re yearning for a gaming experience like Halo but in the modern day, this could be what you’re looking for!

item.title: Bonus Round: Best Quests - Top 5 - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming adventurers Paul and Josh are back with another incredible Bonus Round. This week we dive into our Top 5 Quests breakdown. Quests can make or break a game (we’re looking at you New World) but a great questline can create a gaming memory that will stick with you forever. This week we talk about the quests we remember the most and what made them so amazing. From silly to epic, we’ve got the list and the full breakdown in this episode! item.title: Beta Breakdown Episode: New World and Back 4 Blood - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming beta testers Josh and Paul are back with another video game news filled episode of This Week in Gaming. This week we chat about the recent gaming beta’s for Amazon’s New World MMO and Back 4 Blood, the spiritual successor to Left 4 Dead 2. We chat our thoughts on both games, whether the hype is real and if we think they’ll be games we want to pick up when they officially release in the next couple of months. item.title: Deep Dive: Tribes of Midgard - Gaming Podcast

This week we’re taking on the Jotunn and protecting Yggdrasil in the latest gaming hit Tribes of Midgard. It’s an episode you don’t want to miss! item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another video game news filled episode of This Week in Gaming. This week we chat about the Halo Infinite Technical Flight and the hype that’s coming from that. Then we dive into two lesser known upcoming titles. The Vale is an audio-only gaming experience (don’t worry, it’s cooler then you think) before talking about the mythological Achilles and his upcoming game release. This week we chat about two hot new releases this week (The Ascent and Tribes of Midgard), dive into the surprise that was Google’s Olympic RPG and wonder why Splitgate exploded onto the gaming scene all of a sudden after it’s been out for some time. item.title: Bonus Round: Press Q for Questions - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are back with another incredible Bonus Round. What’s becoming one of everyone’s favorite episodes is back. This week we’re diving into another round of Listener Questions. Submitted by gaming legends like yourself, we’re tackling all the things the listeners want to know. item.title: Deep Dive Double Header: Stardew Valley and Outer Wilds - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are bringing you a fantastic episode. This week we nominated a game for the other host to play and are now deep diving both games. Josh nominated Outer Wilds for Paul to play and Paul nominated Stardew Valley for Josh. Two gaming powerhouses that are very different gaming experiences then each host is used to. Don’t miss this amazing episode!

item.title: TWIG: Dismal Dark Alliance, Blaston Backs Down and Battlefield 4 Blows Up - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with another video game news filled episode of This Week in Gaming. This week we share what we’ve been playing recently, dive into the dismal Dark Alliance release, remind developers once again you can’t put ads in paid games, reveal the real reason Battlefield 4 has taken off and share all the other gaming news you need to know.

item.title: Deep Dive: Satisfactory - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming engineers Paul and Josh and building a better planet and bringing you their latest Deep Dive. This week's gaming breakdown is a journey into the world of Satisfactory. Plop down a smelter and let's kick back as our constructors do the work while we chat about this unique offering to the gaming community. We break down all aspects of the game in this episode, tell you what we think and whether it's worth your time. Will it be Satisfactory? Only one way to find out! item.title: Deep Dive Double Header: Operation Tango and Knockout City - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are bringing the heat in this extra special gaming double header deep dive! First up we test out or hacker and spy chops in Operation Tango and give you our thoughts on this little known game, then we jump back to our highschool gaming glory days and smash people in the face with dodgeballs in our review of Knockout City. A double header like this only comes once in a lifetime... Ok, maybe every few months for us, but that sounds less dramatic. item.title: Bonus Round: Overhaulin’ the Leaderboard - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are back with a fantastic episode you don’t want to miss. This week we dive deep into our gaming Leaderboard and make some much needed changes to the best list in all of gaming. Since introducing some single player games, we had to reconcile how to fit them in and where to properly rank them as well as updating some under-ranked games and maybe fixing a few that were ranked too high. Only one way to see what happens in this awesome episode! item.title: Deep Dive: Hood Outlaws & Legends - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are donning the roles of your favorite anti-heroes in this week’s gaming deep dive of Hood Outlaws & Legends. We don the roles of Robin, Tooke, John and Marianne to see what works and what doesn’t in the latest entry into the PvEvP gaming genre. Does Hood Outlaws and Legends hit the bullseye or miss the mark? Check out the episode to see what we think! item.title: Bonus Round: Best Console of All Time - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul, Josh and Todd are back with another awesome Bonus Round. This week we duke it out tournament style as we seek to crown the best gaming console of all time. item.title: My Cuphead Is Killing Me (Cuphead) - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are jumping into the insanely colorful (and difficult) world of Cuphead. Known for its high level of difficulty throughout the gaming world, Cuphead is a masterpiece of action, art and rage inducing bosses. It’s time for another gaming deep dive as we break down everything you could want to know about Cuphead, how the multiplayer stacks up, how we rate it in make love, marry or murder, and where it falls on our leaderboard. item.title: Blizzcon, Nintendo Direct Disappointment and Remaster Rage - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Video Game hosts Josh and Paul are back with another This Week in Gaming. We dive into the big video game announcements from Blizzcon and Nintendo Direct in this episode. Don’t miss out as we chat Overwatch 2, Diablo 4, the new Mario Golf and other big video game announcements you don’t want to miss. That plus stupidity… lots of gaming stupidity is sure to happen! item.title: Valheim Teaser, Drakes Odds: Survive and Ashes of Creation Excitement - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Video Game hosts Josh and Paul are back with another spectacular This Week in Gaming. Sally on up as we share a brief snippet of our Valheim adventures before chatting about the dumbest game name in video games Drakes Odds: Survive before talking about MMO gaming’s hottest upcoming title Ashes of Creation. Our excitement for this video game is starting to show as we talk about the latest class breakdowns and multi-class guide. item.title: Terraria Hysteria (Terraria) - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are digging deep into this week's highly requested episode. You asked for it, and we played it. Now we’re here to talk all about our experiences with Terraria. One of the most sold video games in gaming history, we talk about what it’s like to come into this video game as a newb, then discover why this is truly one of the juggernauts in gaming. It’s the Terraria episode you’ve been waiting for! Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: Steam Festival Demo’s, Gamestop Update and Josh Forgets a Month - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Video Game hosts Paul and Josh are back with another incredible episode of This Week in Gaming. A quick update on how we won or lost on Gamestop stock is followed by a truly embarrassing confession from Josh before we dive into the various video game demos found in the latest Steam Festival. We pick out some of the best and most hilarious video games to chat about and give our thoughts on and see which caught our eye, and which you should be on the lookout for! item.title: Bonus Round: Nintendo Nostalgia Lane- Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Josh and Paul are back with quite possibly one of our favorite episodes. We travel back to the glory days of video games and break down our favorite gaming memories of the console that changed the world - The Nintendo Entertainment System. We chat some of our favorite games, memories, hilarious stories and dive into everything that made this gaming console so epic! item.title: Bowsers Fury, The Day Before Announced and Diamond Hands 4Ever - Gaming Podcast
item.description: Gaming hosts Paul and Josh are coming in hot in our latest This Week in Gaming with a quick synopsis of the Gamestop insanity and what is actually going down with WallstreetBets. Then we dive into Nintendo’s newest upcoming gaming release - Bowser’s Fury and why we’re excited for it. Game trailers and announcements follow and of course, a large dose of stupidity and hilarity for dessert! item.title: Couch Co-Op Part 2: Raft and Minecraft Dungeons - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming savants Josh and Paul come at you like a ticking Creeper time bomb as we tackle two games in one show. First we break down the hidden gem of survival gaming with Raft, then jump into the pixelated world of Diablo… err we mean Minecraft Dungeons as we talk about the latest 4 player dungeon crawler to hit the gaming universe. It’s double the content with half the calories as we break down these fun co-op games in this week’s episode! item.title: Bonus Round: Rage Quit Games - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming rage-quitters Paul and Josh let their anger flow like a Sith in this week’s Bonus Round. Grit your teeth, get ready to hit alt+F4 and prepare for that angry uninstall as we talk about our favorite gaming rage-quits. Join us as we share funny experiences and stories from our past and realize that Paul might have Josh beat when it comes to anger issues. Gaming should be fun, but when it isn’t, rage-quits become a real thing, and we’re here to share the misery. Support us on Patreon Follow us on Twitter Follow us on Instagram Subscribe on YouTube Visit us on the web

item.title: Down And A Way Out (A Way Out) - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming spartans Josh and Paul escape prison, evade the law and dive into A Way Out in this week’s episode. A rather unique foray into co-op gaming, A Way Out is a character driven, split screen, story based co-op game filled with great characters and funny moments. Join us as we dive into this co-op gaming gem and tell you what works, and what doesn’t in this week's episode. item.title: Bonus Round: The Greatest Year of Game Releases - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming gurus Josh and Paul come together in another amazing Bonus Round. This time we do our research and come up with the best year for game releases. We dive into decades worth of gaming and decide which year was the top for releases in a single year. Which year will reign supreme? Will Josh show his age and go back in time? Will Paul be lured by the big name gaming releases of yester-year? Will we ask another question in this episode description? Will you listen in to find out? item.title: Farcry me a River (Far Cry 5) - Gaming Podcast
item.description:
Gaming tycoons Josh and Paul head up our first episode without Todd (Good luck on baby watch 2020 Todd!). Join us this week as we dive into one of gaming's comfort foods - Far Cry 5. Like a warm bowl of ramen, delicious but not always filling, we tackle this title like an enraged linebacker. From the crazy characters to the multitude of missions, we chat what makes this game work, where it falls short and where we think it falls on the gaming leaderboard.
